title: Fuel Scooped from Stars
query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Scooped), 0) AS total, COUNT(*) AS scoops FROM FuelScoop WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {total} tonnes of fuel scooped from scoopable stars across {scoops} stellar refuelling pass(es) during the report period. Fuel scooping is the quiet pulse of long-range travel — a large total represents many stellar passes, careful corona-skirting, and the skill of knowing which star types are worth the approach.
details.help: FuelScoop Scooped is the amount scooped per pass. total drives the title as the cumulative fuel volume.

tagLines: Stellar fuel scoop telemetry compiled. Total hydrogen fuel collected from scoopable stars during the period.
Every scoop was a carefully calculated approach into a stellar corona. You've done it many times.
The fuel doesn't cost credits. It costs attention, timing, and knowing your heat tolerance by feel.
